input.background: The freeware program StaTable can determine exact probabilities for t-random variables. You can also use WinPepi WhatIs.exe or Microsoft Excel's TDIST function for this purpose.
input.question: Use one of these software applications to find Pr(T_8 ≥ 2.65)

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

T_8.description: The value of the t-random variable with 8 degrees of freedom for which we need to find the probability Pr(T_8 ≥ 2.65).

Pr(T_8 ≥ 2.65).description: The probability that the t-random variable with 8 degrees of freedom is greater than or equal to 2.65.
